title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
summary: 文章介绍了vLLM项目推出的原生速度Transformers建模后端，旨在通过优化推理引擎显著提升大语言模型的运行效率，并保持与Hugging Face Transformers库的兼容性。
highlights: vLLM introduces a native-speed modeling backend for Transformers.
The backend achieves significant performance improvements for LLM inference.
It maintains compatibility with the Hugging Face Transformers library.
